name: cpas-sandbox
description: CPAS Sandbox Debate System (Cowork_CPAS) — 2-session 16-turn architecture. v0.9.15: Sandbox_Log 영구 토의 기록 — 자동 저장(Quality Gate 무관), research_queue 출처 링크 안정화(Sandbox_Log [N]), Advocate/Skeptic 인용 규칙 추가. v0.9.14: Research Queue Filter — {RESEARCH_CONTEXT} 양쪽 전달. v0.9.13: D-axis redesign (8단계). v0.9.12: Evidence Conflicts. v0.9.11: Data Integrity Check. Session 1 (Exploratory 8T) + Session 2 (Offensive 8T). Dynamic Data Filters. Log management via cpas-manager plugin.
